MINUTES
(404)PETITIONER APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. RESPONDENT APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. THE COURT GRANTED A THREE YEAR RESTRAINING ORDER. RESPONDENT SHALL NOT CONTACT, MOLEST
, ATTACK, STRIKE, THREATEN, SEXUALLY ASSAULT, BATTER, TELEPHONE, SEND ANY MESSAGES TO, FOLLOW, STALK, DESTROY THE PERSONAL PROPERTY OF, OR OTHERWISE
PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY VERONICA MORI CSR# 7006
ETITIONER'S RESIDENCE, PETITIONER'S WORKPLACE, AND THE CHILD'S SCHOOL OR DAY CARE. (KING)
RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING MICROFILMED REEL/BATCH F:250-29
MINUTES
(404)PETITIONER APPEARED WITH COUNSEL WHO WAS SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR CAROLE LANGFORD, ESQ. RESPONDENT APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO FAMILY COURT SER
VICES FOR MEDIATION AND RETURNED SHORTLY. THE PARTIES AGREE THAT VISITATION BETWEEN FATHER AND CHILD WILL TAKE PLACE ON THE 1ST AND 3RD WEEKENDS OF
CHRISTMAS TIME THE CHILD SHALL SPEND ONE WEEK WITH EACH PARENT. BOTH PARTIES WERE AFFIRMED AND TESTIFIED IN THEIR OWN BEHALF. FATHER SHALL PICK UP
RALLY. THE PICK UP TIME SHALL DEPEND ON RALLY AVAILABILITY. IF FATHER MISSES A VISIT WITHOUT HAVING GIVEN FORTY-EIGHT HOURS NOTICE THEN THERE SHALL
PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY VERONICA MORI CSR# 7006
6:00 P.M. THE EXACT TIME OF THE RALLY EXCHANGE WILL DEPEND ON RALLY AVAILABILITY. (KING)
